reviewer_prior_involvement_notes: Executor identity: Claude/Anthropic Opus 4.8 (claude-opus-4-8), the recorded review-2 fallback the human assigned; reviewer_prior_involvement=breakdown because Anthropic authored 12-development-breakdown.md via Opus 4.8 (review-2-routing-design-conflict-evidence.md, review-2-routing-human-opus48-override.md, status.json.breakdown_author). Session disclosure: same dedicated read-only reviewer session reused; not fresh. That dedicated reviewer session never implemented or fixed any code; all delivery and P2 repair authorship is zhipu_glm (glm-5.2), so review-2 implementation/fix provider isolation holds. All review work used only non-mutating git diff/show and file reads; no file write, no .env read, no server start, no network/private-channel probe, no launchctl. Coverage honesty: canonical stage reports, product/architecture/design/test evidence and the delivery source were read cumulatively across this same session's earlier review and recheck turns (not re-read verbatim in the final turn); the final coverage turn actually ran and inspected the COMPLETE non-reports code/config diff of git diff --binary 3bb253a..ed7d9e0 -- . ':(exclude).../status.json' in chunks: config/docs/schemas/registry/ACTIVE.json, workflows/templates/stage-delivery.yaml, scripts/harness_stage_lib.py, scripts/validate-stage.py, scripts/model-adapters/claude-glm-wrapper, scripts/model-adapters/claude-glm-pty-wrapper, scripts/auto-review-runner.py (full 549 lines), the three scripts/tests Harness test files (full 643 lines), and the six delivery/launcher paths backend/app/server.py + backend/tests/test_service_health.py + deploy/launchd/...plist.template + scripts/service-control.py + scripts/tests/test_service_control.py + scripts/run-server.sh (full 2476 lines; run-server.sh unchanged). This is a complete inspection of all non-reports code/config diff; the reports side was read as the prompt-named canonical raw evidence and this review does not claim verbatim inspection of every historical reports diff. The recomputed fingerprint equals the immutable bind. The prior review-2 P1 (real launchd fails from the ~/Desktop TCC-protected checkout, exit 126) is resolved by the user's authoritative runtime-acceptance scope amendment (22-human-runtime-acceptance-amendment.md), which honestly retains the exit-126 evidence as an environment limitation rather than a launchd PASS; PRD/ARCHITECTURE do not make launchd terminal-independence a hard product requirement (11-adr scopes it as an operational utility). The prior P2 is fixed by a bounded post-bootstrap readiness gate. The in-range Harness infrastructure changes are the stage's documented auto-pilot prerequisites (14-18 repair reports) and are safe: shlex.quote on every substituted value, Bash and .env/.git/AGENTS/workflows/agents/schemas/reports writes denied, alias/environment never logged, PTY transport fails closed on synthetic/sdk-cli; they introduce no funding-hedging product change and no secret leak.
reviewed_artifacts: complete non-reports code/config diff (git diff --binary 3bb253a489bf2854d8b9d81060a45ca056e1cea2..ed7d9e0a71d05aab15cc1ecad2f8197989b54b9d, chunk-inspected in full for every non-reports changed path) plus canonical raw report artifacts named by the review prompt; fingerprint recomputed and matched

findings.title: 诊断脱敏为 best-effort 正则（设计已声明的可接受残余）
findings.evidence: _SECRET_KV_RE/_BEARER_RE/_APIKEY_HEADER_RE/_COOKIE_RE/_URL_USERINFO_RE 覆盖常见秘密模式，_redact docstring 明确声明 best-effort；test_service_control.py 断言 signed query/Cookie/Set-Cookie/X-MBX-APIKEY/Bearer/URL userinfo 的 dummy 字节不出现在任何 doctor bundle 文件。
findings.impact: 理论上仍可能漏掉自定义头名或非常规凭证格式；但 base URL 校验阻断凭证从主 URL 进入、控制器从不读取 .env、plist 不含秘密，主来源已受控，风险有限，不构成开放 P0/P1。
findings.recommendation: 后续若扩展私有渠道或引入新凭证来源再扩充脱敏词典；本阶段保持现状可接受，作为残余风险记录，非必修项。

residual_risks: 诊断脱敏为 best-effort 正则，不保证覆盖全部秘密模式；已由 base URL 校验、不读取 .env、不复制环境、plist 无秘密共同降低。
真实 launchd 生命周期在当前 ~/Desktop TCC 保护位置无法独立运行（exit 126），已由用户运行时验收修正案显式接受为环境限制；本机常规启动/可视验收改用人工启动的 scripts/run-server.sh。该 launchd 控制器仍是面向非 TCC 保护 checkout 的可用交付。
实现/修复作者(zhipu_glm)历史过程偏离：P2 attempt-1 两次只读 grep（attempt-2 无偏离），均只读且未触碰交付边界/.env/真实 launchctl，pre-review 与 review-1 已披露，不影响代码接受性。
冻结范围内含本 stage 的 auto-pilot Harness 前置改动（adapter wrapper/tool-policy/runner/validator/schema/文档），已随 14-18 报告留档并具确定性测试；均无产品语义改动、无秘密泄露，属交付 T1 之外的基础设施面，随分支一并合并。
真实安装/合并/推送仍是本终态后的显式人工门；本裁决仅推进到 stage_accepted_waiting_user，不授权合并到 main。
